notes: Auto update checks can now run every minute.
Settings now has an Auto-check interval selector: 1, 5, 15, 30, or 60 minutes.
Default update check interval is 1 minute while Online mode is enabled.
After an in-app update starts, SA CHECK closes itself and the installer opens the app again when finished.
Silent update installs no longer show the Setup wizard.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
